module.name: client
module.purpose: Client modules for CLI, remoc-backed core Session/Task, a session-owned Executor managing ToolRegistry and client-only ToolRuntime instances, shared common::protocol ToolSignature/ToolExecutionStatus tool types, and Config-aware tool registry/runtime tooling.

childModules.name: cli
childModules.purpose: Interactive CLI binary entry and public interface for connecting to the core client endpoint, sending typed prompts as chat requests, and streaming ChatResponseSegment task response content to stdout.

childModules.name: core
childModules.purpose: Core client session/task endpoint where ClientSession owns a shared Executor and ClientTask handles ResponseMessage, terminal Complete/Closed, ToolInvocation dispatch, and TaskEvent::ToolQuery(ToolSignature) status dispatch before continuing to receive.

childModules.name: executor
childModules.purpose: Client-side Executor API that receives a ToolRegistry, invokes ToolInvocation requests, stores many ToolRuntime instances by call id, answers ToolSignature status requests with ToolExecutionStatus values, and cancels calls; behavior remains draft stubs.

childModules.name: tool
childModules.purpose: Client-side tool interface layer with category metadata, Config-aware registry lookup, native implementations, client-only ToolRuntime status/cancel state (statuses, status_tx, cancel_rx, cancel_tx, and latest ToolExecutionStatus), and Tool trait invocations using shared common::protocol ToolInvocation values and re-exported protocol types.
